prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 21202→26103→26634→27528→27910，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 4 年累计后移约 6700 名；2025 年基准约 27910 名，近年降幅有所收窄；该校在山西省物理类招生计划 2021 年 175 人、2022 年 180 人、2023 年 178 人、2024 年 260 人、2025 年 293 人，呈持续扩招态势；2026 年计划 289 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 1.4%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海南大学为 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 144 名持续上升至 2026 年第 87 名，近年排名提升显著，综合实力不断增强；2023 年曾因师德师风事件出现偏负面舆情，但 2024 年已转为中性/混合，2025–2026 年无负面记录，声誉趋于平稳；抖音热度从 2023 年"一般"升至 2025–2026 年"较热"，总排名第 32 位，短视频曝光度明显提升，反映报考关注度上升；第五轮学科评估中海南大学无 A- 及以上学科，优势学科主要集中在农林、法学、信息等方向，整体学科实力处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推 荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度重合，相关专业热度对报考有正向拉动；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年减少约 3.4%，考生规模下降缓解部分竞争压力；海南大学位于海南省海口市，属热带滨海城市，对北方考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在 山西省招生规模较大（物理类近 300 人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年小幅缩招、学校排名持续上升及抖音热度提升带来的关注度增加，同时考虑本省物理类考生减少约 3.4% 的缓解作用，在 2025 年基准 27910 名基础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约 27706 名，区间 27206–28206 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 21202→26103→26634→27528→27910, showing a continuous downward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 6700 places over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 27910, with a narrowing decline in recent years; the university's enrollment plan in Shanxi Province for physics category was 175 in 2021, 180 in 2022, 178 in 2023, 260 in 2024, and 293 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 289, a slight reduction of about 1.4% compared to 2025, leading to slightly increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, showing significant improvement in recent years and continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; in 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics, but it turned neutral/mixed in 2024, with no negative records in 2025–2026, and the reputation has stabilized; Douyin popularity rose from "average" in 2023 to "relatively hot" in 2025–2026, ranking 32nd overall, with significantly increased short video exposure, reflecting rising application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University had no A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly in agriculture, forestry, law, information, etc., and overall discipline strength is at a medium level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly overlapping with the university's physics category enrollment majors, and the popularity of related majors positively drives applications; the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province in 2026 is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, with a decline in candidate scale alleviating some competitive pressure; Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, a tropical coastal city, which has a certain regional appeal to northern candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Shanxi Province (nearly 300 in physics category), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026, the continuous rise in university rankings, and the increased attention from Douyin popularity, while also taking into account the mitigating effect of a 3.4% decrease in physics category candidates in the province, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 27910; the predicted minimum ranking is about 27706, with a range of 27206–28206.

学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science list has continuously risen from 144th in 2021 to 87th in 2026, with significant improvement in recent years and continuously strengthening comprehensive strength; in 2023, there was a negative public opinion incident related to teacher ethics, but it turned neutral/mixed in 2024, with no negative records in 2025–2026, and reputation tends to be stable; Douyin popularity rose from 'average' in 2023 to 'relatively hot' in 2025–2026, ranking 32nd overall, with significantly increased short video exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University has no A- or above disciplines, and the evaluation levels of liberal arts enrollment majors such as law, finance, and accounting are not high, but the social popularity of law major is still at a recommended level.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, and the continuous rise in university ranking, but the significant reduction of about 25.6% in local history category examinees is the biggest favorable factor, significantly easing competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to move forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4,636, with a range of 4,136–5,136.
